US, Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before 2-Week Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**

Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders, Alpenglow Upgrade Slashes Finality to 150ms | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

signals.headline: Economic Activity Surges to $1
signals.raw:
Economic Activity Surges to $1.1 Trillion in Q1 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**[5]

Solana's on-chain economic activity reached $1.1 trillion in Q1 2026, a 6,558.6% increase from the previous quarter—marking a historic milestone in network adoption and transaction throughput.[5]

signals.headline: Institutional ETF Momentum Continues Despite Market Consolidation | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Momentum Continues Despite Market Consolidation | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

Major financial players including BlackRock and Fidelity have disclosed record SOL ETF holdings. The SEC officially classified SOL as a commodity in March 2026, with seven major asset managers filing for spot Solana ETFs.[2][6]

signals.headline: Technical Resistance: SOL Testing $87-$108 Range | CONDITIONAL | MEDIUM confidence**[5]
signals.raw:
Technical Resistance: SOL Testing $87-$108 Range | CONDITIONAL | MEDIUM confidence**[5]

Analysts note SOL is testing resistance near $87, with $108 as the next major target if bullish momentum holds, though the token currently trades in the $80–$90 range amid consolidation.[5][6]
